description: Institutional article pair relationships for internal linking, reading paths, and cluster navigation.

pairs.comparison_reason: AI sector earnings multiples reprice as rate environment shifts; TLT/IEF duration risk drives QQQ/SMH relative performance.
pairs.educational_value: Shows how yield curve normalization and policy path affect growth sector valuations.
pairs.left_title: AI and Semiconductor Sector Context: Educational Momentum and Scenario Review
pairs.right_title: Treasury Yields and Rate Context: Educational Framework for Market Scenarios

pairs.comparison_reason: AI/semiconductor ETF flows are a primary driver of broad ETF rotation signals; XLK outperformance vs equal-weight divergence.
pairs.educational_value: Demonstrates how concentrated sector leadership (SMH, SOXX) shapes broader rotation patterns.
pairs.left_title: AI and Semiconductor Sector Context: Educational Momentum and Scenario Review
pairs.right_title: ETF Rotation Context: Flow Signals and Educational Sector Scenarios

pairs.comparison_reason: Rate environment context feeds directly into ETF sector rotation: duration-sensitive vs rate-insensitive allocation shifts.
pairs.educational_value: Reading path from macro rate context → ETF rotation response → sector positioning.
pairs.left_title: Treasury Yields and Rate Context: Educational Framework for Market Scenarios
pairs.right_title: ETF Rotation Context: Flow Signals and Educational Sector Scenarios

pairs.comparison_reason: Regime state (risk-on/off, volatility regime) shapes how yield signals translate into market positioning.
pairs.educational_value: Regime overlay adds a risk framework around yield context, connecting macro signal to tactical positioning.
pairs.left_title: Market Regime Context: Risk Signals and Educational Outlook Scenarios
pairs.right_title: Treasury Yields and Rate Context: Educational Framework for Market Scenarios

pairs.comparison_reason: AI sector momentum is regime-conditional: risk-on breadth supports participation; risk-off regime creates concentration risk.
pairs.educational_value: Demonstrates how regime classification shapes sector analysis and ETF allocation.
pairs.left_title: Market Regime Context: Risk Signals and Educational Outlook Scenarios
pairs.right_title: AI and Semiconductor Sector Context: Educational Momentum and Scenario Review

pairs.comparison_reason: Factor rotation between growth and value operates at both ETF and individual stock level with similar macro drivers (rates, earnings, cycle phase).
pairs.educational_value: Pairing ETF-level and stock-level factor analysis creates a complete educational picture of growth/value dynamics.
pairs.left_title: Growth ETFs vs Value ETFs: Factor Exposure, Valuation, and Risk Context
pairs.right_title: Growth Stocks vs Value Stocks: Understanding Different Equity Research Frameworks

pairs.comparison_reason: Bond ETF duration and dividend ETF income share defensive allocation context: both are alternatives to equity risk.
pairs.educational_value: Illustrates the defensive spectrum from pure duration (TLT/IEF/BND) to income-generating equity alternatives (SCHD, VIG).
pairs.right_title: Dividend ETFs Explained: Yield, Quality Screens, and Risk Trade-offs

pairs.comparison_reason: SPY vs QQQ is a core diversification decision point; concentration risk in QQQ is a key example of sector-level diversification trade-offs.
pairs.educational_value: Connecting comparison page to diversification guide provides the "why" behind broad vs concentrated ETF choice.
pairs.right_title: ETF Diversification Guide: Holdings, Sectors, Overlap, and Risk

pairs.comparison_reason: Risk comparison and diversification are complementary educational frameworks for evaluating ETF construction.
pairs.educational_value: Together they form a complete entry-level ETF education path.
pairs.left_title: ETF Risk Comparison Guide: Volatility, Beta, and Drawdown Research
pairs.right_title: ETF Diversification Guide: Holdings, Sectors, Overlap, and Risk

pairs.comparison_reason: Tech stock sensitivity to rate changes is the stock-level expression of the macro yield context covered in the market outlook.
pairs.educational_value: Bridges the macro yield article with sector-level equity implications.
pairs.left_title: Interest Rates and Technology Stocks: How Monetary Policy Affects Growth Equity Valuations
pairs.right_title: Treasury Yields and Rate Context: Educational Framework for Market Scenarios

pairs.comparison_reason: Defensive investing strategy and dividend ETFs share capital preservation and income objectives, and often feature overlapping holdings.
pairs.educational_value: Pairs strategic context (defensive investing) with tactical ETF implementation (dividend ETFs).
pairs.left_title: Defensive Investing Explained: Sectors, ETFs, and Risk Management Research
pairs.right_title: Dividend ETFs Explained: Yield, Quality Screens, and Risk Trade-offs
